# Load the hadith DB and search for the snippet
import json, re, unicodedata, sys, os
from collections import Counter
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

hadith_path = '/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json'

with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:

# inspect a sample record

# Define normalization functions
import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""
                             [\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]
                             """, re.VERBOSE)

tatweel_re = re.compile(r'ـ+')

def normalize_arabic(s):
    s = s or ''
    # normalize hamza forms to bare hamza (not sure which mapping desired)
    # Replace different hamzas with a common hamza (ء)
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    # also normalize taa marbuta to haa? maybe not
    # remove diacritics
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = tatweel_re.sub('', s)
    # remove punctuation and symbols except arabic letters and numbers
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0621-\u064A0-9\s]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    # lowercase not relevant for Arabic
    return s

# Test normalization
sample = "إِنَّ لِلَّهِ مِيقَاتَيْنِ: مِيقَاتًا لَا يَعْذُبُ أَحَدًا فِيهِ وَلَا يُحَاسِبُهُ، وَمِيقَاتًا يُعَذِّبُ مَنْ يَشَاءُ وَيَدَعُ مَنْ يَشَاءُ"
print(sample)
print(normalize_arabic(sample))

snippet_full = "إِنَّ لِلَّهِ مِيقَاتَيْنِ: مِيقَاتًا لَا يَعْذُبُ أَحَدًا فِيهِ وَلَا يُحَاسِبُهُ، وَمِيقَاتًا يُعَذِّبُ مَنْ يَشَاءُ وَيَدَعُ مَنْ يَشَاءُ"
snippet_short = "إِنَّ لِلّ...نْ يَشَاءُ"  # as provided though contains elision
norm_full = normalize_arabic(snippet_full)
norm_short = normalize_arabic(snippet_short)
norm_full, norm_short

# define token-based F1
def token_f1(a, b):
    # tokens are words separated by spaces
    a_tokens = a.split()
    b_tokens = b.split()
    if not a_tokens or not b_tokens:
        return 0.0
    a_counts = Counter(a_tokens)
    b_counts = Counter(b_tokens)
    common = sum((a_counts & b_counts).values())
    prec = common / sum(a_counts.values())
    rec = common / sum(b_counts.values())
    if prec + rec == 0: return 0.0
    return 2 * prec * rec / (prec + rec)

scores = []
for idx, rec in enumerate(hadiths):
    text = rec.get('Matn') or rec.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    norm_text = normalize_arabic(text)
    s = token_f1(norm_full, norm_text)
    if s > 0.2:  # filter
        scores.append((s, idx, rec, text[:200]))
scores_sorted = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)[:30]
len(scores_sorted)

for s, idx, rec, snippet in scores_sorted[:30]:
    print(s, idx, rec.get('hadithID', 'noID'), rec.get('BookID'), snippet)

# compute sequence matcher ratio between norm_full and normalized hadith text for all hadiths
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
best = []
for idx, rec in enumerate(hadiths):
    text = rec.get('Matn') or rec.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    norm_text = normalize_arabic(text)
    ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, norm_full, norm_text).ratio()
    best.append((ratio, idx, rec.get('hadithID')))
best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)[:20]
best_sorted

# compute best similarity in Quran DB

    ayah = rec.get('ayah_text','')
